description: Build the complete Liquid Glass Component Library: all reusable UI components with Framer Motion spring animations, proper TypeScript typing, accessibility features, and responsive behavior. This includes GlassCard, GlassButton, GlassInput, GlassModal, GlassSheet, GlassNavbar, GlassSidebar, GlassDropdown, GlassAvatar, GlassBadge, GlassChip, GlassSkeleton, Toast/Snackbar system, EmptyState, ErrorState, and CallOverlay shell.
steps: Create components/ui/GlassCard.tsx - glass surface with rounded corners, optional hover animation, accepts children

Create components/ui/GlassButton.tsx - variants: primary (gradient bg), secondary (glass bg), ghost (transparent), danger (red). States: loading (spinner), disabled (opacity). Spring scale on press via Framer Motion (stiffness 300, damping 0.7)
Create components/ui/GlassInput.tsx - floating label that animates up on focus, gradient focus ring (primary to secondary), error state (red border + message), character counter, glass background

Create components/ui/GlassModal.tsx - backdrop blur overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.6) + blur(8px)), spring scale+fade entrance (from 0.95 scale), focus-trapped (tab cycling), Escape key closes, portal-rendered
Create components/ui/GlassSheet.tsx - bottom sheet on mobile (<768px) with drag handle and swipe-to-dismiss, side panel on desktop. Spring animation for open/close

Create components/ui/GlassNavbar.tsx - sticky top, transparent at scroll position 0, glass surface after scrolling (useScrollPosition hook), responsive (hidden on mobile where bottom tab bar shows instead)
Create components/ui/GlassSidebar.tsx - desktop fixed left nav (hidden <1024px), active route has gradient highlight, nav items with icons
Create components/ui/GlassDropdown.tsx - keyboard navigable (arrow keys, Enter to select, Escape to close), glass surface dropdown panel, supports custom trigger element

Create components/ui/GlassAvatar.tsx - sizes: xs(24px)/s(32px)/m(40px)/l(56px)/xl(80px)/xxl(120px). Online dot (green absolute positioned), verified badge slot, premium gradient ring (gold shimmer for premium), shimmer placeholder while loading
Create components/ui/GlassBadge.tsx - variants: verified (blue check), founder (gold star), premium-silver, premium-gold, ai-creator (purple), business (green). Pill shape with icon + label
Create components/ui/GlassChip.tsx - selectable pill, spring scale animation on select (scale 0.95 to 1.05 back to 1), active state has primary gradient border

Create components/ui/GlassSkeleton.tsx - shimmer diagonal sweep animation (CSS keyframes with pseudo-element), shape variants: text (rectangle), circle, card (rounded rectangle), avatar (circle with specific sizes)

Create components/ui/Toast.tsx + lib/store/uiStore.ts toast methods - toast/snackbar system with spring slide-in from top, variants: success (green), error (red), info (blue), warning (yellow). Auto-dismiss after 4s, manual dismiss X button
Create components/ui/EmptyState.tsx - centered illustration placeholder, title, description, optional action button
Create components/ui/ErrorState.tsx - error icon, title, description, retry button

Create components/feature/CallOverlay.tsx - full-screen glass overlay shell (empty implementation), local+remote video placeholders, control buttons (mute, camera, end call). Wired to callStore for open/close state
Create components/ui/index.ts - barrel export file for all glass components
acceptance_criteria: All 16+ glass components exist in components/ui/ with proper TypeScript props interfaces
All interactive components use Framer Motion spring animations (stiffness 300, damping 0.7)
GlassModal has focus trapping and Escape-to-close
GlassSheet is responsive (bottom sheet mobile, side panel desktop)
GlassNavbar transitions from transparent to glass on scroll
GlassAvatar supports all 6 size variants with online dot and badge slots
Toast system integrates with uiStore for global toast management
CallOverlay shell exists and uses callStore state
All components use the design tokens from tailwind.config.ts and globals.css
Barrel export index.ts exports all components
All components include -webkit-backdrop-filter for Safari and @supports fallbacks where backdrop-filter is used
verification: Confirm all component files exist in components/ui/
Confirm components use Framer Motion motion.div with spring transitions
Confirm TypeScript interfaces are defined for all component props
Confirm barrel export file exports all components
findings: All 16 glass components + CallOverlay created successfully. Used glass-surface utility class (from globals.css) for GlassCard for proper @supports fallback. Added shimmer keyframe animation to both globals.css and tailwind.config.ts. Updated (main) layout to include ToastContainer and CallOverlay globally. Cannot verify build due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network. All components use 'use client', Framer Motion spring (stiffness 300, damping 20), cn() utility, and -webkit-backdrop-filter where backdrop-filter is used.
